name: Kamala Harris
subject: I intend to win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
I’ll be blunt: I am writing you another message today asking you to contribute to our campaign for president. Fundraising is one of my least favorite parts of the job if I’m being honest, but it’s a necessary part because we’re being outraised and outspent like never before. Here’s how I see it: I’ve never run for president before. I didn’t start with a massive war chest of campaign cash. I’m not a billionaire who can self-fund or spend a vast personal fortune to try to win this primary. I am someone who has worked for the people my entire career -- standing up to powerful special interests and bullies like Trump who prey on the most vulnerable and voiceless in our society. It’s why I believe I’m the best candidate to prosecute the case against four more years of Donald Trump in the White House. But first, we have to win this primary -- and that means ensuring we reach our mid-month fundraising goal before Friday’s deadline. Now here’s the part where I need to ask you to pitch in: **I’m asking personally: will you add a donation to our campaign to help us raise $250,000 online before Friday’s deadline? This is critical to our success, and I know we can do it with your help:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190814?refcode=ema190814-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=5955_5755789_GSQV3x&akid=5955%2E5755789%2EGSQV3x)
---
| [Chip in $25 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190814?refcode=ema190814-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&express_lane=true&t=2&refcode2=5955_5755789_GSQV3x&akid=5955%2E5755789%2EGSQV3x)
---
| | [Chip in $50 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190814?refcode=ema190814-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=50&express_lane=true&t=3&refcode2=5955_5755789_GSQV3x&akid=5955%2E5755789%2EGSQV3x)
---
| [Chip in $100 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190814?refcode=ema190814-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=100&express_lane=true&t=4&refcode2=5955_5755789_GSQV3x&akid=5955%2E5755789%2EGSQV3x)
---
| | [Chip in $250 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190814?refcode=ema190814-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=250&express_lane=true&t=5&refcode2=5955_5755789_GSQV3x&akid=5955%2E5755789%2EGSQV3x)
---
| [Another Amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-ema-190814?refcode=ema190814-4-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=6&refcode2=5955_5755789_GSQV3x&akid=5955%2E5755789%2EGSQV3x)
---
I intend to win this election, and we’re going to do it the right way: by bringing people together and embracing our commonality. Thanks in advance for all that you do.
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list. name: Steve Chabot
subject: A “Beautiful” Letter
body:
A "Beautiful" Letter No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A "Beautiful" Letter](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-j/)
President Trump announced a few days ago that he'd received another letter from North Korea's dictator Kim Jong Un. Not only was it a letter, but it was a "beautiful" letter.

Click the link below to read more in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [El Paso and Dayton](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-d/)
Well, it's happened again. Twice. Crazy/evil men with guns, killing and wounding innocent people, just for the hell of it. This time in El Paso, Texas. And just up the road from our community, in Dayton.

Click the link below to read my thoughts in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Kowtowing to China](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-u/)
More and more, China is having influence over a particular sector of our American entertainment industry. Why you ask? I'm on the blog today talking about it.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [A Story that Got Ignored Last Week](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-n/)
Last week, the news got consumed by one story - President Trump's ongoing battle with four Democratic Congresswomen. As a result of this media frenzy, there were other important matters that got no coverage whatsoever - that you probably never even heard about. I'd like to tell you about one of those things, that really mattered to a too-often overlooked segment of our country.

Click the link below to read more. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdlilkht-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Berrett
subject: update
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| Hi, I wanted to reach out to give you an update on the latest developments. Even though an overwhelming majority of Minnesotans (Both Democrats AND Republicans) support common-sense gun safety measures and emergency insulin for all, the Minnesota Senate GOP is still refusing to come to the table to get them done in a special session. Here's why: They're covering for the NRA and Big Pharma and they think they can get away with it. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/YQK7SMVv0ExGFo-QTHp2pTYdbvCUMYL346JZyBKM_rU=/wuySy36hv5guozsfoSeNPDx8oQsf4mr1JnLtJX-DgSI=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
Hi,
I wanted to reach out to give you an update on the latest developments.
Even though an overwhelming majority of Minnesotans (Both Democrats AND Republicans) support common-sense gun safety measures and emergency insulin for all, the Minnesota Senate GOP is _still_ refusing to come to the table to get them done in a special session.
**Here 's why: They're covering for the NRA and Big Pharma and they think they can get away with it.** We need to make it 100% clear that if they continue to put special interests ahead of the people who elected them, our campaign is prepared and capable of electing allies in their place who won't.
Our mid-quarter deadline is coming up at midnight tonight, and if we hit our $15,000 goal, it's a _huge_ opportunity to send them a message by proving our One Minnesota movement is stronger than ever.
[**Will you make a quick donation of $5 or more to help us make up the difference? We need to act fast because we 're still about $4,600 short right now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/YQK7SMVv0ExGFo-QTHp2pTYdbvCUMYL346JZyBKM_rU=/wuySy36hv5guozsfoSeNPDx8oQsf4mr1JnLtJX-DgSI=?refcode=body-p&amount=25)

name: Mike Thompson
subject: an important birthday this week
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aR-76MXlWtUvFxpiwCfyy4EP0Z29kgB7UuRXD1KiVPQ=/f-7zRIG37eSVQ_kvtJRT752I5YNitS88VMB9l7-5lSk=)
Peter - This week marks 84 years since FDR signed the Social Security Act into law. Today, nearly 90 percent of retirees receive and rely on Social Security benefits, including over 130,000 people here in our district.

This critical program is the bedrock of our retirement system, so we must honor this important milestone with action to protect it for future Americans.

[Will you sign the birthday card and urge lawmakers to protect Social Security for generations to come?](https://act.myngp.com/el/aR-76MXlWtUvFxpiwCfyy4EP0Z29kgB7UuRXD1KiVPQ=/f-7zRIG37eSVQ_kvtJRT752I5YNitS88VMB9l7-5lSk=)

Millions of Americans worked hard to earn their Social Security benefits, and they should be able to rest knowing their retirement is secure.

While it is the most reliable government program, if we don't act to protect and strengthen Social Security now, our seniors and most vulnerable neighbors could face the consequences.

[Sign our card to wish a happy birthday to Social Security and commit to strengthening it!](https://act.myngp.com/el/aR-76MXlWtUvFxpiwCfyy4EP0Z29kgB7UuRXD1KiVPQ=/f-7zRIG37eSVQ_kvtJRT752I5YNitS88VMB9l7-5lSk=)

Thanks for taking action.
Mike

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/aR-76MXlWtUvFxpiwCfyy4EP0Z29kgB7UuRXD1KiVPQ=/f-7zRIG37eSVQ_kvtJRT752I5YNitS88VMB9l7-5lSk=)
* * *
_Mike Thompson is a veteran and a longtime public servant. He represents California 's 5th district in Congress, where he fights for our healthcare and a clean environment every day. He cannot continue to do his crucial work without the support of people like you. [**Consider making a donation of any amount now.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/aR-76MXlWtUvFxpiwCfyy4EP0Z29kgB7UuRXD1KiVPQ=/X8B1KfriFtCt-fzI_8AnmxYR5XppIvA5uZLPC6dJD6U=?amount=15&recurring=true&refcode=MT_EM_PT_WL_190814_1_1&firstname=%7B%7BFirstName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&lastname=%7B%7BLastName,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr1=%7B%7BAddressLine1,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&addr2=%7B%7BAddressLine2,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&email=%7B%7BRecipientEmailAddress,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&zip=%7B%7BZipCode,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&city=%7B%7BCity,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&state=%7B%7BState,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&phone=%7B%7BPhoneNumber,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&occupation=%7B%7BOccupation,DefaultTo=%7D%7D&employer=%7B%7BEmployer,DefaultTo=%7D%7D)_

name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: We are so close!
body:
| | Peter, A couple of weeks ago, I wrote to you about an incredible opportunity we had – but I needed your participation to make it a reality. Do you remember? A long-standing friend offered us a $100,000 “Matching Check Challenge.” **[The challenge came with a promise: For every dollar you contribute to us BEFORE the two week deadline, she will also contribute a dollar of her own money on behalf of you and every other person who makes a donation to the Challenge (up to $100,000)](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=1).** This is a chance to turn $100,000 in contributions from our members into $200,000. And we need every penny of that $200,000 to fund our multi-phase, multi-platform plan to elect Christian-minded lawmakers across the country in 2020. **We haven’t raised the $100,000 yet...but we are getting so close. We’ve raised $84,000 and we need to raise $16,000 more to hit our goal for this matching grant challenge.** So our friend, who is sponsoring the Matching Check Challenge, agreed to EXTEND the deadline – but only until August 30 – for online donations. **Our strategy is so important, that I believe it’s the one thing standing between the growing number of secular progressives in our government and their push to fundamentally redirect our country away from God and our values.** Yes, Christians like us wield THAT much power...IF we get out the vote. And getting out the vote for 2020 starts now. **[So please, if you have not yet made a donation to the matching challenge, prayerfully consider making a contribution today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=2).** It’s an incredibly important time for you, me, our families, and the biblical principles we believe in. Remember the issues at stake...abortion, immigration, borders, gender politics... the freedom to express our religion, to provide our children the best education, to choose our own healthcare, to grow businesses without government interference...the system of government under which we live. It’s a time for choosing. **On one side are the mainstream media, billionaire lobbyists, and liberal lawmakers. They are dangerously pressing for “more.”** More illegal immigration. More of the class, gender, racial, and religious warfare they’ve created. More rights to kill fully viable prenatal babies. More personal and political power. On the other side stands us and the millions of other Americans who believe our country’s policies and politicians must stand in defense of biblical values and religious freedom. We are a direct threat to those who believe in government control over our lives – to radicals who view Americans like us with contempt – and want to banish God from our institutions. I know that you are deeply concerned about who controls Congress and who wins the White House. If we elect the wrong leaders, they will destroy the future we want for our children. **[That’s why our friend made the commitment to use her own money to DOUBLE every dollar you give right now](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=3).** If you’re one of the many My Faith Votes members who already made a Matching Challenge Gift, thank you! We are so grateful to you. And if you have not donated but are considering being part of our effort to see 90-million Christians in America pray, think and vote - then now is a great time to donate and stand with us! It’s our time to step up to the plate and ensure our plans are funded and underway for 2020. I truly believe that when we stand united for biblical values we will see principles of faith and freedom secured for the next generation. [](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190815apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=4) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=5)
---

10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=6).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=8) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190815apl01nd&n=9)
clean_body: | | Peter, A couple of weeks ago, I wrote to you about an incredible opportunity we had – but I needed your participation to make it a reality. Do you remember? A long-standing friend offered us a $100,000 “Matching Check Challenge.” . This is a chance to turn $100,000 in contributions from our members into $200,000. And we need every penny of that $200,000 to fund our multi-phase, multi-platform plan to elect Christian-minded lawmakers across the country in 2020. We haven’t raised the $100,000 yet...but we are getting so close. We’ve raised $84,000 and we need to raise $16,000 more to hit our goal for this matching grant challenge. So our friend, who is sponsoring the Matching Check Challenge, agreed to EXTEND the deadline – but only until August 30 – for online donations. Our strategy is so important, that I believe it’s the one thing standing between the growing number of secular progressives in our government and their push to fundamentally redirect our country away from God and our values. Yes, Christians like us wield THAT much power...IF we get out the vote. And getting out the vote for 2020 starts now. . It’s an incredibly important time for you, me, our families, and the biblical principles we believe in. Remember the issues at stake...abortion, immigration, borders, gender politics... the freedom to express our religion, to provide our children the best education, to choose our own healthcare, to grow businesses without government interference...the system of government under which we live. It’s a time for choosing. On one side are the mainstream media, billionaire lobbyists, and liberal lawmakers. They are dangerously pressing for “more.” More illegal immigration. More of the class, gender, racial, and religious warfare they’ve created. More rights to kill fully viable prenatal babies. More personal and political power. On the other side stands us and the millions of other Americans who believe our country’s policies and politicians must stand in defense of biblical values and religious freedom. We are a direct threat to those who believe in government control over our lives – to radicals who view Americans like us with contempt – and want to banish God from our institutions. I know that you are deeply concerned about who controls Congress and who wins the White House. If we elect the wrong leaders, they will destroy the future we want for our children. . If you’re one of the many My Faith Votes members who already made a Matching Challenge Gift, thank you! We are so grateful to you. And if you have not donated but are considering being part of our effort to see 90-million Christians in America pray, think and vote - then now is a great time to donate and stand with us! It’s our time to step up to the plate and ensure our plans are funded and underway for 2020. I truly believe that when we stand united for biblical values we will see principles of faith and freedom secured for the next generation. United. We Stand. Gov. Mike Huckabee Honorary National Chairman * ©2019 My Faith Votes 10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134

That's why we're building a national movement calling on former Governor John Hickenlooper to run for Senate: [**Add your name and help draft John today!**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4757/4bd7760e/4cc31cc8/77e64812/2113586546/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+and+help+draft+John+if+con&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3") [](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4757/4bd7760e/4cc31cc8/77e64811/2113586546/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3") | | | [Run, John, Run!](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4757/4bd7760e/4cc31cc8/77e64810/2113586546/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Run+John+Run&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3")
---
* * *
Republican Senator Cory Gardner is more vulnerable than ever before.
Polling shows he is underwater with his constituents, trailing a generic Democrat by multiple points if the election were held today, and representing one of only two GOP-held Senate TOSS-UP seats.
But here's why we NEED John: **Gardner has raised more than $8 MILLION toward his re-election and Mitch McConnell will be spending TENS of millions of dollars to defend his seat.**
The only Democrat who stands a chance to unseat Gardner is John Hickenlooper -- The former Governor of Colorado and scientist by training achieved near universal healthcare access AND universal background checks during his tenure.
He even led the nation in terms of action on climate change and **won the state -- TWICE.** We need his pragmatic, policy-based leadership in the Senate now more than ever before.
[**If we want to defeat Gardner and end McConnell 's Majority, then we need you to join us in telling John Hickenlooper to run for Senate! >>**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4757/4bd7760e/4cc31cc8/77e6481f/2113586546/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+If+we+want+to+defeat+Gardner+and+end+McC&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3")

Draft John Hickenlooper

| [www.drafthickforsenate.com](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4757/4bd7760e/4cc31cc8/77e6481c/2113586546/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://drafthickforsenate.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+wwwdrafthickforsenatecom&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3&source=314_EM_EN_190814_HICDraftLaunchPT_U1_X3")

| Draft Hick for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

name: Sara Gideon
subject: quick note
body:
We need to make every day count.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dc1/4bef7a87/699c1bf4/287f6130/3695261879/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
I was hoping to send a quick note about our campaign before the day got away from me. Thank you for reading.
Here's the truth: tonight at midnight, we'll be exactly halfway through this fundraising quarter, and we're not where we hoped to be at this point.
We can still catch up, but it's going to require a big team effort. That's why I have to ask:
**[Will you make a $3 contribution to our people-powered campaign before midnight? I'm not accepting any money from corporate PACs, so your donation makes a big difference to our team.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dc1/4bef7a87/699c1bf4/287f6137/3695261879/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190815-full")**
I don't need to remind you, this is an important race. The result will make a very real difference in the lives of Mainers - and could determine control of the Senate.
That's why my pledge to you is that we are going to run hard, every day. We are going to talk about the issues that matter most and we are going to empower our supporters to do the kind of big and important work it will take to win.
We will make the most of every single day we have left in this campaign - but in order to do that, I need your help.
**Please make a contribution before midnight to help us keep pace with our fundraising goal:**
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/HalfwayThere](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dc1/4bef7a87/699c1bf4/287f6137/3695261879/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190815-full")**
The depth of support I have received from people like you is not something I take lightly. Without you, this campaign would not be where we are today.
So from the bottom of my heart, thank you.
All my best,
_Sara_
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dc1/4bef7a87/699c1bf4/287f6137/3695261879/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTA4MTUtZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-august?refcode=em190815-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dc1/4bef7a87/699c1bf4/287f6136/3695261879/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802dc1/4bef7a87/699c1bf4/287f6135/3695261879/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Team Fair Fight
subject: Will Stacey Abrams see you in Snellville this Saturday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight
body:
As we launch our nationwide movement to support and fund voter protection teams across the country, we're going back to Annistown Elementary School to kick things off. |
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53a/34a064cc/180fbeb3/703ca39/2040362801/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | | Friend - Everything we do is about the people of Georgia. Because if we can't access democracy in Georgia, then our country's core commitment to a representative government is under threat. And nowhere was the role of voter suppression more evident last year than Annistown Elementary School. Last year, the Annistown Elementary polling location was the subject of one of three federal court rulings against Georgia election policies, for implementing an inconsistent provisional ballot system and failing to provide provisional ballots while machines were down. So as we launch our nationwide movement to support and fund voter protection teams across the country, we're going back to Annistown Elementary School to kick things off. [**Will you join Fair Fight Founder and Chair Stacey Abrams and Democratic Party of Georgia Chairwoman Nikema Williams for a Fair Fight 2020 kickoff event on Saturday, August 17 at 2 pm in Snellville?**](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53a/34a064cc/180fbeb3/703ca46/2040362801/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/annistown-elementary-school?source=IE081519AES") Early on in 2018, the Democratic Party of Georgia became the first state party in the country to hire a full-time, permanent voter protection director. And in so doing, our state became a model for the nation and followed in the legacy of civil rights leaders who knew that the power of the vote could unleash the power of our people. This movement for voting rights is all of ours, friend, and our victory over voter suppression will be too. So thank you for continuing to show up and speak out. See you Saturday,
Team Fair Fight **[RSVP](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53a/34a064cc/180fbeb3/703ca46/2040362801/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://secure.fairfightaction.com/j/step/annistown-elementary-school?source=IE081519AES")**
---

|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53a/34a064cc/180fbeb3/703ca47/2040362801/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.facebook.com/FairFightAction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53a/34a064cc/180fbeb3/703ca44/2040362801/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://twitter.com/fairfightaction/") [](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa53a/34a064cc/180fbeb3/703ca45/2040362801/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.instagram.com/fairfightaction/")

clean_body: As we launch our nationwide movement to support and fund voter protection teams across the country, we're going back to Annistown Elementary School to kick things off. | "" | | | Friend - Everything we do is about the people of Georgia. Because if we can't access democracy in Georgia, then our country's core commitment to a representative government is under threat. And nowhere was the role of voter suppression more evident last year than Annistown Elementary School. Last year, the Annistown Elementary polling location was the subject of one of three federal court rulings against Georgia election policies, for implementing an inconsistent provisional ballot system and failing to provide provisional ballots while machines were down. So as we launch our nationwide movement to support and fund voter protection teams across the country, we're going back to Annistown Elementary School to kick things off. "" Early on in 2018, the Democratic Party of Georgia became the first state party in the country to hire a full-time, permanent voter protection director. And in so doing, our state became a model for the nation and followed in the legacy of civil rights leaders who knew that the power of the vote could unleash the power of our people. This movement for voting rights is all of ours, friend, and our victory over voter suppression will be too. So thank you for continuing to show up and speak out. See you Saturday, Team Fair Fight "" | "" "" "" 1270 Caroline Street Suite D120-311 Atlanta, GA 30307 (C)2018 Fair Fight, All rights reserved Contributions to Fair Fight are not tax-deductible. "" | | Paid for by Fair Fight

name: Bettina
subject: Abigail doesn’t accept corporate PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/jEkaGnrbUrDw5X25I5wmKkw4QXQm-h-azd2CLN3e4sM=/yVXGf6gEu6sejuxYbl87OtUS5CgiEQdjEVC1Ummgvh8=?refcode=BLU-footer)

---
Peter,

A few months into her first race, Abigail decided not to accept corporate PAC donations. This was certainly not an easy decision (especially for a first-time candidate!) but it was a decision she made after listening to voters along the campaign trail who routinely expressed their concern that corporate PAC donations were influencing the behavior of elected officials. What better way to address that concern and restore trust than to take that money off the table?

But now, Washington Republicans have made it clear that special interest money will flood into Virginia's seventh to stop Abigail from winning reelection and fighting for the people of Central Virginia. But we believe in the strength of our support from grassroots donors and the power of regular people to help shape an election.
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/jEkaGnrbUrDw5X25I5wmKkw4QXQm-h-azd2CLN3e4sM=/IyyI7JVFYr3LcEY5W4XGPRx09oHVRC81gR1YWQwkv0Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190814-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
That grassroots support is what sustains us. It's also going to be crucial to our victory in 2020.

[_**Grassroots support is what is going to help us win this race. Grassroots donors are key to that. I know it doesn 't seem like much, but could you take a moment now and contribute $5, $10, or $25?>>>**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jEkaGnrbUrDw5X25I5wmKkw4QXQm-h-azd2CLN3e4sM=/IyyI7JVFYr3LcEY5W4XGPRx09oHVRC81gR1YWQwkv0Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190814-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

| | [DONATE NOW](https://act.myngp.com/el/jEkaGnrbUrDw5X25I5wmKkw4QXQm-h-azd2CLN3e4sM=/IyyI7JVFYr3LcEY5W4XGPRx09oHVRC81gR1YWQwkv0Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190814-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)
---
Abigail is doing the hard work it takes to serve her constituents and win re-election, but when special interest money starts flooding this race, it's going to be imperative that we have the resources to fight back.

[_**Can you make a donation now to help fund our grassroots campaign?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/jEkaGnrbUrDw5X25I5wmKkw4QXQm-h-azd2CLN3e4sM=/IyyI7JVFYr3LcEY5W4XGPRx09oHVRC81gR1YWQwkv0Q=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20190814-2-EM&amount=50&amounts=5,10,20,50,100,250)

---
Thank you,
_Bettina_

Each quarter, we lay out a plan of how we're going to grow this movement and win. We're halfway through this quarter, so we're checking in on the goals we wanted to reach by this point:

Take Elizabeth's 42,000th photo with a grassroots supporter.

Cross one million grassroots contributions.

Release plans for a fair and welcoming immigration system, ending Wall Street's stranglehold on our economy, a new approach to trade, and more.

Visit Ohio, Michigan, Arizona, Nevada, Iowa, and New Hampshire.

**[ ] Get halfway towards our quarterly fundraising goal.**

We're so proud of all that we've been able to accomplish together. But that last item is huge. If we can't reach our quarterly goal before the next FEC deadline, we won't be able to make all the investments we need to make to win.

We're at the mid-quarter mark **tonight** , and right now we're behind where we need to be to reach our quarterly goal.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Tom Emmer: "I believe we have the best healthcare on the planet"
disclaimer_text: paid for by the taxpayers, and none of his wealthy campaign donors have trouble getting the care they need
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
# Disappointed but not Supprised

Last night Tom Emmer hosted a town hall in Saint Cloud and the room was filled with people frustrated by his efforts to dismantle the ACA, and his refusal to vote for even the most basic measures to deal with the problem of gun violence in our country.

One story sits heavy on my heart. It is the story of a girl just a few months old, whose insurance provider denied her the care that she needs to live. That family needs to come up with $2 million for that child to receive the medical treatments she needs to live, and after hearing that story Tom Emmer heartlessly responded by saying that he believes we have the best healthcare system in the world.

I am sure he thinks that it's true, he has plenty of money and great insurance paid for by the taxpayers, and none of his wealthy campaign donors have trouble getting the care they need. The two-tiered healthcare system is working for him and his circle of friends, while the rest of us are left to simply hope we don't come down with something expensive to treat.

Today I am asking you to [donate ](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=882ef72117&e=c56804a14d)to my campaign so that we can get real representation in this district. My request for your help in this effort comes with a promise; if elected I will do everything within my power to ensure that no American goes into bankruptcy or is turned away at the hospital simply because of the number on their bank statement.

Your friend,

_Ian A. Todd_

name: Cory Booker
subject: We didn't make it, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team -- I have some bad news and some good news. The bad news is last night was the deadline for our $350,000 mid-month goal, and we fell $18,216 short. The good news is we decided to extend our deadline until _tonight_. My team will now close the books on our mid-month numbers tonight, August 15th, at 11:59 p.m. **[Will you chip in right now to help us raise the remaining $18,216 of our mid-month goal?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdate-actives_actives_L1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Team, I know this is no easy task -- August is historically a tough month for fundraising. But our campaign has seen real momentum since the last debate, and we need to show people that this underdog campaign can keep it up. **[So please, team, help us reach our $350,000 mid-month goal by 11:59 p.m. to keep us on track.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdate-actives_actives_L2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for helping us reach this critical goal,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em1?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdate-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beshear/Coleman 2019
body:
Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in America. His approval ratings are underwater, and he can't even show up to parades and festivals without getting drowned out by boos.
|
---

| | Peter,

Matt Bevin is the most unpopular governor in America. His approval ratings are underwater, and he can't even show up to parades and festivals without getting drowned out by boos.

So it's no surprise that Bevin's getting desperate. And so are national Republicans -- they know he can't win this race on his own. In fact, President Trump is coming to Louisville next week to try to bail out Matt Bevin by hosting a big fundraiser. **So let 's show Bevin that his expensive fundraisers are no match for our army of grassroots supporters. With ideas like socialized medicine, on-demand abortion, and open borders, they will say anything to get elected. We know that their policies are too radical for Kansans.

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Every moment has been worthwhile
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
I have some big news for you--but first, I want to say thank you. Robin and I will be forever grateful for the time, energy, and dedication you have contributed to this campaign. | | |
---
| Friend,

I have some big news for you--but first, I want to say thank you. Robin and I will be forever grateful for the time, energy, and dedication you have given to this campaign.

This morning, I announced that I am no longer running for President of the United States in 2020. But even though this campaign didn't have the conclusion we were hoping for, every moment of it has been worthwhile.

We've been on an _incredible_ journey over the past six months. I've visited numerous states (and biked across Iowa), sampled more than a few local brews, spoken to thousands of voters, stood tall on the national debate stage--and I couldn't have done it without each and every person on this team.

**I wish I could explain my decision and the path forward to each of you, face to face, so I made this video to tell you directly.** [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e6a/4078704246/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/videos/391834658187286") **My head is held high. I know better than anyone that the end of one chapter is just the start of another.** When I lost my job as a geologist, I wasn't sure what the future would hold for me. But that loss turned into the chance of a lifetime--it took losing that job for me to start my own brewery, and to eventually make the leap from small business owner to public servant.

That's why I know everyone will keep up the good fight. In just a few months, we've laid out a path toward a more equitable economy that doesn't lead us to extremes. I called on my personal experience leading Colorado through tragedy to build an effective nationwide plan for gun violence prevention. And we made the case that health care is a right, not a privilege, and should be treated as such.

**When I look back at what we 've accomplished on this campaign, I feel proud to have had you by my side every step of the way. **And when I do make my next move, you'll be the first to know.

See you a little ways down the road...

Giddy up,
John

---
| | Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
---

PO Box 6377, Denver, CO 80206
Contributions or gifts to Hickenlooper 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, you can join the Hickenlooper 2020 team by **[_signing up right here_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e6b/4078704246/VEsE/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in")**.
Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e68/4078704246/VEsF/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e69/4078704246/VEsC/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e66/4078704246/VEsD/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e67/4078704246/VEsA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--but if at any point you'd like to opt out, you can do so right [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e64/4078704246/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please [_**update your information here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/6377171e/691c9bd/6e930e89/11a44e6b/4078704246/VEsO/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/join-in").

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: The filibuster has got to go
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,
Gun violence is ravaging American communities on a daily basis, but just a few days ago, a bipartisan effort to enact common sense background checks on all gun purchases was killed – it’s time to eliminate the filibuster.

{IMAGE}

I am running for US Senate because part of my professional skill set is in restructuring dysfunctional systems. We will have to scrap the current Senate rules and come up with new rules that encourage deliberative, effective action on the people’s business.
It’s time for the Senate to stop playing politics with the filibuster. Can you donate $5 right now so we can elect a senator who will vote to end the abuse of the filibuster? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/filibuster-gun-violence?refcode=em081519-a&noskip=true]
We need to eliminate the filibuster so we can close the gun show loophole and require universal background checks for all gun sales.
This isn’t only about mass shootings. It’s also about a host of gun violence prevention initiatives.

Protecting women from domestic abusers who might kill them with access to a firearm.
Saving the lives of people who are mentally ill and more likely to commit suicide with access to a firearm.
Saving the lives of children who are struck down by illegal guns every day.
Keeping guns out of the hands of criminals.

Mitch McConnell and the Republican caucus are bought and paid for by the NRA – an institution that has abandoned its duty to represent responsible gun owners, and has become a shill of corporate gun manufacturers whose only responsibility is to sell more guns to turn a higher profit.
Domestic terrorism is ravaging our communities, but as long as the filibuster remains in place we’ll need at least 60 votes to pass a single bill in the Senate.
We need to end the filibuster to bring Rep. Lucy McBath’s “red flag” law to the floor.
We need to end the filibuster to bring HR 8, the universal background check bill, to the floor.
We need to end the filibuster to ban assault weapons and keep our streets, schools, churches, concerts, clubs, movies, malls, and communities safe.
It’s time to end the Senate filibuster so we can finally address gun violence with common sense legislation. Donate today if you agree. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/filibuster-gun-violence?refcode=em081519-a&noskip=true]
We’re going to need a new Civic Infrastructure for progressive change in our country. Ending the filibuster is an important step.
Your's truly,
Teresa
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/filibuster-gun-violence?refcode=em081519-a&noskip=true]
<<View this email in your browser.>> [https://teresatomlinson.com/the-filibuster-has-got-to-go-2/]

name: Mike Espy
subject: Mississippi needs a governor like Jim Hood
body:
|
---
This November, Mississippians have the opportunity to elect a governor who will truly represent their best interests, not out-of-state corporations or special interests, in what could be our state's first competitive gubernatorial election since 2003.
Friend,

This November, Mississippians have the opportunity to elect a governor who will truly represent their best interests, not out-of-state corporations or special interests, in what could be our state's first competitive gubernatorial election since 2003.

**There 's only one person in this race who I know will do that, and it's Attorney General Jim Hood.**

We have a real shot at taking the governor's mansion with Jim as the nominee: after first winning statewide office in 2003, he's gone on to win reelection three times since, always winning with a double-digit lead.

Not only can Jim win, but he can make real progress for the people of Mississippi: he's dedicated to expanding affordable healthcare, improving public education, and growing our economy by creating good-paying jobs and supporting small businesses and farmers.

**Jim is a proven leader who will put Mississippi 's working families first, and that's why I'm proud to support his campaign for governor.**

**Join me in supporting Jim: make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford to help give him the resources it 'll take to win this critical race in November.**
_If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/0VX43W9eVVFzjBMtkxdZ_zRdIK_SoUj_8fLC72VDEYU=/B1lGFbACHk3mCB3st-CYGUUcm8Axnp8WnFmEcSgMuOs=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190815nd&amount=5)**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/0VX43W9eVVFzjBMtkxdZ_zRdIK_SoUj_8fLC72VDEYU=/B1lGFbACHk3mCB3st-CYGUUcm8Axnp8WnFmEcSgMuOs=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190815nd&amount=10)**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/0VX43W9eVVFzjBMtkxdZ_zRdIK_SoUj_8fLC72VDEYU=/B1lGFbACHk3mCB3st-CYGUUcm8Axnp8WnFmEcSgMuOs=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190815nd&amount=25)**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/0VX43W9eVVFzjBMtkxdZ_zRdIK_SoUj_8fLC72VDEYU=/B1lGFbACHk3mCB3st-CYGUUcm8Axnp8WnFmEcSgMuOs=?express_lane=true&refcode=20190815nd&amount=50)**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/0VX43W9eVVFzjBMtkxdZ_zRdIK_SoUj_8fLC72VDEYU=/B1lGFbACHk3mCB3st-CYGUUcm8Axnp8WnFmEcSgMuOs=?refcode=20190815nd)**
Don't get me wrong: this is going to be a tight race, especially with the opposition's attack ads trying to mischaracterize Jim and his record. But with enough grassroots people-power to mobilize voters across the state, political media outlets like DailyKos are saying _" Hood may be able to pull off an upset in November."_

I know Jim has what it takes to win and represent all Mississippians: it's just a matter of giving him the resources to get out the vote and defeat the corporate-backed political machine trying to maintain their grip on power.

[**Will you support Jim and me today by pitching in a grassroots contribution of $5 or more?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0VX43W9eVVFzjBMtkxdZ_zRdIK_SoUj_8fLC72VDEYU=/B1lGFbACHk3mCB3st-CYGUUcm8Axnp8WnFmEcSgMuOs=?refcode=20190815nd&amount=5)

Your contribution, your voice, and your vote can truly make the difference and help us move Mississippi forward.

Thanks,

Mike

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I will restore trust in our government and our democracy, here’s how:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
As President, I pledge to devise an administration of the people, by the people, and for the people -- by prioritizing humanity first.

| | | |
---
| Friend --
---
| Americans don’t trust our government. It’s gotten so bad that only 17% approve of the way Congress does their job. And that’s better than the percent of people who think Congress is doing their job honestly and ethically.

It’s no surprise since our leaders are more interested in petty, partisan squabbles than they are in passing legislation that impacts the lives of every American.

Our infrastructure is crumbling, the student debt crisis is destroying the lives of an entire generation, 100 people die from gun violence every day, and automation continues to put more and more Americans out of work. In the wealthiest, most advanced country in the world, life expectancy is going down and inequality is going up. Many Americans don’t have time to care about our democracy because they are working 2 or 3 jobs and still can’t afford to make ends meet.

**Change has to be made or our country will continue to crumble -- and this change must start at the top.**

**[If you agree, add your name here to sign on to my plan to rebuild trust in government and in our democracy. We can only make change this big with every person on this team ready to fight for it.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQy2dd2O42CLERYOws7k-2Frp-2BqkQOW7D993MZYojwAZYyl6NmPflQ1VrXikjYBBsKTqqYxgF1VEXA5b1aLcsHPc4LvPNv2dEpxNL3ca6g29iRXCCVflAgwJyQ2xgo0fel1dJSKraAVVwuU9IsWpPE-2Fj2nAxVdpt8heGG3dOipK4kyNp1WIE62vqsijtkKHTmilkbZPL9hsJPfkys4ujFnAYuS8hKOp-2BTA-2BY2uz42WBRC4plH4mSTjo-2BXKIyhpJgRaFwj-2Fdd2o9-2Fh6J01tdDxdctWQ-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FwWJxG0qOBH1CxGrvJkuroZISZS4naXEISLerHfVFhgFbEn4P9EQLNkNL7OIjRlhcR4EBcYSKiLYJ2BWOwb4yGMrd9Of4S4mwrZXc93pmomf7C-2BCNBGbUnEom934nVpiwwRUOhplcFyVRrQtU5V4cxfW9XaV4STgZ1ccjaBOB6-2FLxD3SRHsBlR3UzqIyCSCEJbkVxCzWk8gpKZP9Sofgb9SriN2iumGWT8SCMo5var2HFYW1xgkimWoZ6XSkeg1IymkPWnB5IVgobXGGJjP1PB8iVoCfnfz5N-2F41LPyf-2FBaQ8DRZwxDaxk-2Fuu7uqqLqBjQvQ-2FoG3v-2BehUyJRjVIJvbg-3D-3D)**

| As President -- I will restore trust in our government and democracy. Here’s how:

Over the past several decades, many in Washington have forgotten that government was forged to be of the people, by the people, and for the people. Instead, special interests are funding our elections creating politicians beholden to corporations instead of the American people.

**It’s time to get money out of politics -- ending the revolving door by preventing regulators from becoming lobbyists for these corporations.** That includes ending Citizens United and promoting public funding of elections through what I call “Democracy Dollars.”

**We will reform the FEC so that it can better enforce disclosure laws, end partisan gerrymandering, and move to Ranked Choice Voting to promote positive campaigning.** As President, I will divest from personal and business interests and disclose my tax returns so that we can also rebuild trust in the Executive Branch. It doesn’t end there.

**I will carry the federal government into the 21st century by creating a Department of Technology.** This Department will regulate tech companies, create public databases to make Congress’ business transparent, and make sure that all federal legislators understand how technology works (so we don’t repeat the Facebook hearing).

I’ll be honest, it’s going to take courage and big, bold action. Standing on the hallowed ground in Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, President Lincoln reminded us of the important work we must all do. Each generation -- each American -- must do everything in their power to show that a nation conceived in liberty and dedicated to the proposition that every man is created equal, can not only endure but thrive.

**It’s time we reform our democracy to live up to that ideal. As President, I pledge to devise an administration of the people, by the people, and for the people -- by prioritizing humanity first.**

[Will you add your name here and sign on to my plan to restore our democracy and rebuild trust in our government? It will take a large movement of people working together to make this a reality.](http://trk.klclick.com/wf/click?upn=-2BIAqDMuImSGKgCGE2sotQy2dd2O42CLERYOws7k-2Frp-2BqkQOW7D993MZYojwAZYyl6NmPflQ1VrXikjYBBsKTqqYxgF1VEXA5b1aLcsHPc4LvPNv2dEpxNL3ca6g29iRXCCVflAgwJyQ2xgo0fel1dIrdWHPMbB6l525vEfdpL2UpPS4lQSt8GbxaoGWH5MVwhzc2Gmy8ANDSUZ8Zj23Idd6xAaeNpcOBe8q8kseQb7xWhdiadWmas0Tku52TipMC6HeVqZDTwDE-2B-2BTdSR-2F02pJceCRRusvUv9lznXFIzEho-3D_enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFbLQSoKhQqtPS-2FGMblNyE-2FwWJxG0qOBH1CxGrvJkuroZISZS4naXEISLerHfVFhgFbEn4P9EQLNkNL7OIjRlhcR4EBcYSKiLYJ2BWOwb4yGMrd9Of4S4mwrZXc93pmomf7C-2BCNBGbUnEom934nVpiwwRUOhplcFyVRrQtU5V4cxR6kNfYZvgxvc-2FtKQaL75tn01kjZqmHebeZaEQk-2BUJrEKN0aIur1nqRIZ8AfRGp98Vq-2B9glrQRUyJiau7I1pqoIMgMaTyamTZzFoPOEzyz-2BOxYgwKYDAVL62whpItX5jfY-2Bjj7qORn1CsTV-2FYp-2BHaoB33bwaAgRRvXvZXrsmk-2BxyPQhS33ZvPcl5OP7XipJxNQ-3D-3D)

clean_body: As President, I pledge to devise an administration of the people, by the people, and for the people -- by prioritizing humanity first. | | | | | Friend -- | Americans don’t trust our government. It’s gotten so bad that only 17% approve of the way Congress does their job. And that’s better than the percent of people who think Congress is doing their job honestly and ethically. It’s no surprise since our leaders are more interested in petty, partisan squabbles than they are in passing legislation that impacts the lives of every American. Our infrastructure is crumbling, the student debt crisis is destroying the lives of an entire generation, 100 people die from gun violence every day, and automation continues to put more and more Americans out of work. In the wealthiest, most advanced country in the world, life expectancy is going down and inequality is going up. Many Americans don’t have time to care about our democracy because they are working 2 or 3 jobs and still can’t afford to make ends meet. Change has to be made or our country will continue to crumble -- and this change must start at the top. | | As President -- I will restore trust in our government and democracy. Here’s how: Over the past several decades, many in Washington have forgotten that government was forged to be of the people, by the people, and for the people. Instead, special interests are funding our elections creating politicians beholden to corporations instead of the American people. It’s time to get money out of politics -- ending the revolving door by preventing regulators from becoming lobbyists for these corporations. That includes ending Citizens United and promoting public funding of elections through what I call “Democracy Dollars.” We will reform the FEC so that it can better enforce disclosure laws, end partisan gerrymandering, and move to Ranked Choice Voting to promote positive campaigning. As President, I will divest from personal and business interests and disclose my tax returns so that we can also rebuild trust in the Executive Branch. It doesn’t end there. I will carry the federal government into the 21st century by creating a Department of Technology. This Department will regulate tech companies, create public databases to make Congress’ business transparent, and make sure that all federal legislators understand how technology works (so we don’t repeat the Facebook hearing). I’ll be honest, it’s going to take courage and big, bold action. Standing on the hallowed ground in Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, President Lincoln reminded us of the important work we must all do. Each generation -- each American -- must do everything in their power to show that a nation conceived in liberty and dedicated to the proposition that every man is created equal, can not only endure but thrive. It’s time we reform our democracy to live up to that ideal. As President, I pledge to devise an administration of the people, by the people, and for the people -- by prioritizing humanity first. | \- Andrew | | | Thank you for helping to make Universal Basic Income a reality. | | | | | | | All rights reserved. New York, NY #HumanityFirst | No longer want to receive these emails? . Friends of Andrew Yang

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: I need your help on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for America
body:
The past two weeks changed El Paso. They changed America. And they changed me. Moving forward, I will try my hardest to demonstrate the urgency and honesty behind our campaign.
#
The past two weeks have changed El Paso. They’ve changed America. And they’ve changed me too. These last few weeks, I made a decision to focus on El Paso and to be here for my kids and my community. A big part of me wants to stay here with all the people I love.
But this moment requires leadership. It demands we take on the man who bears so much responsibility: Donald Trump. I have to be in this fight for my kids, for El Paso, and for everyone in this country. So today we are heading back out to Mississippi today and Arkansas tomorrow because I’m thinking about this campaign in a new way.
As we get back out there, we’ll need you with us more than ever, especially since we took the last two weeks and focused exclusively on El Paso and healing instead of fundraising and campaigning.
[There is no question in my mind that this was the right thing to do, but I need you to recommit to this fight with me. Can you give our campaign $3 right now to help us make up for our fundraising gap?](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/24338?refcode=ema20190815-49058&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=49058%2E444211%2EVlTOEP)
**[Contribute $3 »](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/24338?refcode=ema20190815-49058&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=49058%2E444211%2EVlTOEP)**
I see more clearly now than I did two weeks ago that the 390 million guns in a country of 320 million, especially weapons of war, are an existential threat to this country. These guns, including the AK-47 variant that the El Paso terrorist used, are meant to be on battlefields, not here in El Paso. They’re meant to kill as many people as efficiently as possible. We cannot sell assault weapons anymore, and we need to get them off our streets.
I see more clearly than ever that we must address our failure to provide the dignity that every American deserves in their lives — from preventing economic isolation to ensuring that everyone realizes their right to health care. If we don’t, we are providing fertile ground for fascism and nativism.
I see more clearly than ever that we must be constantly telling our story — of how we got here, of who we are, of who and what makes this country great — or it will be told by those who will lie and provoke fear.
I see more clearly than ever that we must not just defend immigrants — but elevate them, speak with truth and pride about their accomplishments, and make sure no one in this country — regardless of immigration status — ever has to live in fear.
I see more clearly than ever that when we stand up against Trump and for what we believe in, we are stronger.
**Moving forward, I will fight with urgency and clarity.** I will speak as honestly as possible about the challenges we face and run a campaign that meets this moment.
When Trump terrorizes communities, like we saw last week with his ICE raids in Mississippi, we will be there. We will show up anywhere there is suffering, anywhere people are crying out to be heard. I don’t care if it’s an early state or the last state on the calendar — we will show up.
On the campaign trail, we will be a voice for communities like El Paso which have borne the brunt of Trump’s racism, hatred and division. We will carry El Paso’s strength, kindness, warmth and pride with us at all times.
Ultimately, we will campaign on the belief in an idea of America that has never fully been realized — an idea we know can only be true when all of us come together.
From the very start, we’ve funded this effort with that idea in mind. All our money has been raised from people coming together to chip in what they can. And now we need your help to make our campaign stronger than it’s ever been.
[It’s game on. Not just for this campaign, but for this country. Can you give $3 right now to make sure we can take this fight to Donald Trump? We have a fundraising gap and we need you to help us fill it.](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/24338?refcode=ema20190815-49058&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=49058%2E444211%2EVlTOEP)
Our country is in grave danger. And in this democracy, there are no sidelines to stand on. We either fight to protect America or we lose what this country means to us — and the world — forever.
I’m ready to get after this. I’m ready to fight for our future. But I can’t do it without you.
Thanks for being with us,
Beto
**[Contribute](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/24338?refcode=ema20190815-49058&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=49058%2E444211%2EVlTOEP)**

Paid for by Beto for America
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=23&akid=49058%2E444211%2EVlTOEP). To contribute via check, please address to Beto for America campaign, P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923.

From the very start, we’ve funded this effort with that idea in mind. All our money has been raised from people coming together to chip in what they can. And now we need your help to make our campaign stronger than it’s ever been. Our country is in grave danger. And in this democracy, there are no sidelines to stand on. We either fight to protect America or we lose what this country means to us — and the world — forever. I’m ready to get after this. I’m ready to fight for our future. But I can’t do it without you. Thanks for being with us, Beto Paid for by Beto for America

Tens of thousands of Americans from coast to coast are calling on John Hickenlooper to take his fight back home to Colorado.
We've heard from nearly every Presidential candidate: **No matter who is President in 2021, their agenda WILL be obstructed by Mitch McConnell and his Senate Majority.**
And polling shows Hickenlooper could defeat Sen. Cory Gardner HANDEDLY and get us one step closer to sentencing McConnell to the Minority next year.
Let's prove to him that if he runs we will have his back: And he can hit the ground running because we are with him.

body:

| | **Trump predicts "a 'really good chance' to win Virginia and its 13 electoral votes"**
-- _Roll Call_

[**DONATE NOW >>**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d168/53d9897e/510ac0af/1c8e5427/3606190294/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3MyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-vatrump?refcode=20190815nd__173__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5") Derek,

This confirms everything we've been hearing about the Trump campaign's 2020 plans. At a rally this week, Donald Trump made it clear that Virginia is a central part of his strategy for 2020, telling the crowd he has a "really good chance" of winning the Commonwealth.

That's not just the President blustering for the crowd -- **his campaign is investing heavily in Virginia as we speak**. The Trump campaign has already placed its headquarters in the Commonwealth and deployed its "Trump Victory Initiative" operatives across Virginia!

They're serious about making a play for Virginia's electoral votes and Mark's Senate seat, and we have to be ready to take them on. | **Donald Trump thinks he can win Virginia in 2020. Help us re-elect Mark and beat Trump in 2020.**

We're going to be compiling our mid-quarter report shortly after midnight and we wanted to follow up one last time.
Governor Walz and our House DFL Majority are ready to hold a special session immediately to pass common-sense gun safety measures and emergency insulin for all, but the MN Senate GOP is still refusing to come to the table. It's unacceptable.
If the Senate Republicans won't work with us to deliver the progress Minnesotans are asking for, _we need to prove that we 're ready to elect allies next year who will._

name: Kamala Harris
subject: I just couldn’t stop smiling
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
When I saw the design of our campaign bus during our statewide tour of Iowa last week, I just couldn’t stop smiling. Not because of how much I loved the design -- _and I did!_ \-- but because of the memories I knew it’d help create. Like my trip to the Iowa State Fair, where I got to meet so many amazing people -- and even eat a _pork chop on a stick_ , which was so good. Or when we traveled from river to river across Iowa -- from Sioux City to Davenport -- stopping town by town to talk with voters about our country’s future. I’ll never forget those conversations -- and as we move forward to continue the hard work of winning this primary, we wanted to take a brief moment to commemorate our latest trip to Iowa: **[As a way of saying thank you for your support, our team whipped up some new stickers and we’re giving them away for free. Click here to claim yours before we run out!](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190813-bus-sticker?refcode=ema190815-3-full&source=ema190815-3-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=1&akid=5966%2E5755789%2EKVm1vu)** [](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190813-bus-sticker?refcode=ema190815-3-full&source=ema190815-3-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=2&akid=5966%2E5755789%2EKVm1vu) | | [ GET MY STICKER ](https://action.kamalaharris.org/sign/kdh-email-petition-190813-bus-sticker?refcode=ema190815-3-full&source=ema190815-3-full&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=FL&zip=34223&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&t=3&akid=5966%2E5755789%2EKVm1vu)
---
Thank you so much for everything you do for our campaign -- I hope you get your free sticker while there’s still time!
For The People,
— Kamala Harris

PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). You received this message because you are subscribed to Senator Kamala Harris' mailing list. body:
---
| | A court JUST determined that suppressing Native American votes is okay. Are you kidding?!- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - A court JUST determined that suppressing Native American votes is okay: [](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f8/72412298/40b7c6c1/6102e11b/3230947437/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/native_enfranchisement?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2") _**Are you kidding?!**_ _**The North Dakota GOP enacted one of the most draconian voter ID laws in the entire nation -- because they know people of color are likely Democratic voters.**_ [**Peter, if this law stays in place, thousands of Native Americans will be PERMANENTLY DISENFRANCHISED. We can 't allow this to happen -- add your name to support the repeal of this anti-democratic legislation >>**](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f8/72412298/40b7c6c1/6102e11a/3230947437/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/native_enfranchisement?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=2+-+FirstnameFriends+if+this+law+stays+in+pl&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2") | | | [Sign on >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f8/72412298/40b7c6c1/6102e11d/3230947437/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/native_enfranchisement?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=3+-+Sign+on+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2")
---
**This is despicable.**
Every adult American deserves the right to vote, as is protected by our Constitution -- **but Republicans are fighting tooth and nail to bring us back to the times when only the most privileged among us could participate in our democracy.**
**We 're supporting the repeal of this heinous legislation -- [add your name to reinstate voting rights for North Dakota's Native population >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f8/72412298/40b7c6c1/6102e11c/3230947437/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/native_enfranchisement?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=4+-+add+your+name+to+reinstate+voting+rights&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2")**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://go.protectvoting.org/page/m/6e4d06f8/72412298/40b7c6c1/6102e11f/3230947437/VEsD/p/eyJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG1WdFlXbHNJSDE5IjoiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJlM3NnY21WamFYQnBaVzUwTG5wcGNDQjlmUT09IjoiIn0=/?g=ieagVVH8x8Vckyu3dXyiKiA "https://go.protectvoting.org/page/s/native_enfranchisement?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=voterprotect&utm_content=5+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME+gtgt&utm_campaign=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2&source=VPP_EM_EN_190815_NativeAmericanRights_U1_X2")

We won't allow GOP disenfranchisement to hurt any more Americans.
\-- Voter Protection Project

name: Francis Conole
subject: Wish my mother a happy birthday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conole for Congress
body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)
---

| | Today is an important day, my mother's birthday. It's important for a lot of reasons. She is an incredible human being who has taught me so much about love, hard work, and the importance of service.

Most importantly, for me, specifically, is that her being born was a pretty significant event.

All jokes aside, my mother Pat means everything to me. [**That's why I'm reaching out to ask you to sign her birthday card and send her a message.**](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/pat-birthday?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Thats+why+Im+reaching+out+to+ask+you+to+&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1") [](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/pat-birthday?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1") Happy Birthday to my mother! Thank you for your love throughout my life and for being the strength of our family. So much of who I am and what I have become I owe to you.

Sincerely,

Francis

|
---|---|---

|
---

_This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Francis Conole is running to represent New York 's 24th Congressional District to bring fresh leadership to Central NY. A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. You can learn more about his mission by liking us on **[Facebook](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b19d/388db0e9/80e8647/609af6db/786338432/VEsF/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://www.facebook.com/conole4congress/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Facebook&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1")** and following us on **[Twitter](https://conole.bsd.net/page/m/c82b19d/388db0e9/80e8647/609af6da/786338432/VEsC/?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://twitter.com/Conole4Congress?lang=en&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Twitter&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&refcode=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1")**. **[Click here to contribute to our campaign.](https://conole.bsd.?g=G-UoSFH8x8Vc1mgFDtC1r5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fc-footer?refcode=footer&amount=15&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=5+-+Click+here+to+contribute+to+our+campaign&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1&source=FC_EM_PT_90DO_190815_1_1")**

name: Wilmot Collins
subject: We can end Mitch McConnell's failed leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by A whole lot of folks for Wilmot Collins, PO Box 458, Helena, MT 59624
body:
#
Team,
If Mitch McConnell were worthy of the position of Senate Majority Leader, he would be calling the Senate back from recess to address the issue of gun violence right away. He would be leading the charge to protect and expand health care coverage, not take it away. He would be calling for immediate votes on legislation to slow the disastrous impacts of climate change.
But we know Mitch McConnell won't do any of that. He and his lackeys like Steve Daines are too busy bowing down to special interests and wealthy donors to allow progress for the people.
[**We can end Mitch McConnell 's failed leadership and elect a Democratic majority. But to do that, we must defeat Steve Daines in Montana. Chip in $5 to my campaign now.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190815&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
When Democrats take back the Senate, we'll finally be able to work toward solutions for the problems that people in Montana and all across the nation are facing every day. But with Mitch McConnell and Steve Daines at the helm, we can't expect anything to get done in the Senate.
If you're ready to change the face of Washington, I need you to support my campaign now. The road to Democrats winning back the Senate runs right through Montana, so this race is critical.
[**Contribute $5 --or whatever you can afford--to help us take back the Senate in 2020.**](https://act.wilmotcollins.?g=ENsuPVNw52hc6i6rfY8XtkA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wc-email?refcode=em190815&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Wilmot

name: supremecourt@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: RBG vs. Kavanaugh
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190815mmgoal1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend,

This month is the anniversaries of the Senate confirming **Ruth Bader Ginsburg, Elena Kagan, and Sonia Sotomayor** to the Supreme Court. Contrast them to the nominee that the Senate was considering at this time last year -- **Brett Kavanaugh**. Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have dragged the Court so far to the right it's barely recognizable. If we want to stop McConnell's takeover, we need to make sure Tina stays in the Senate to stand up to him.

**[Pitch in right now to close our $6,972 fundraising gap and save the Supreme Court.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-aug2019?refcode=em190815mmgoal1-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Remember when Mitch McConnell blocked President Obama from filling a Supreme Court vacancy in 2016? He said it was one of his proudest moments.

And despite saying in 2016 that the Senate shouldn't fill a Supreme Court vacancy in a presidential election year, McConnell has now said he would absolutely confirm a Trump nominee if a seat opens up next year.

We have GOT to stop Mitch McConnell. If we don't protect Tina, he is guaranteed to stay Senate majority leader.

**[We're short of our fundraising goal for the month, which means Tina's vulnerable.
