clean_body: | "=" Friend, This month is the anniversaries of the Senate confirming Ruth Bader Ginsburg, Elena Kagan, and Sonia Sotomayor to the Supreme Court. Contrast them to the nominee that the Senate was considering at this time last year -- Brett Kavanaugh. Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump have dragged the Court so far to the right it's barely recognizable. If we want to stop McConnell's takeover, we need to make sure Tina stays in the Senate to stand up to him. "=" Remember when Mitch McConnell blocked President Obama from filling a Supreme Court vacancy in 2016? He said it was one of his proudest moments. And despite saying in 2016 that the Senate shouldn't fill a Supreme Court vacancy in a presidential election year, McConnell has now said he would absolutely confirm a Trump nominee if a seat opens up next year. We have GOT to stop Mitch McConnell. If we don't protect Tina, he is guaranteed to stay Senate majority leader. "=" Thanks, Team Tina | U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race NBC News has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back. ""

name: Michael Bennet
subject: "Dividing America"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
this is a longer email, but it's incredibly important | |
---
| Friends,

I want to talk about election security - how our democracy was hacked by Russia in 2016, how the interference persists today, and what we all need to do to stop it from continuing.

This is a longer email, but I hope you'll take the time to read through the memo I've outlined below.

Short on time? Get an overview at [**RussiaHackedOurDemocracy.com.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648c5/1429800310/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://RussiaHackedOurDemocracy.com?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648c4/1429800310/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackeddememail?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**What happened:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648c4/1429800310/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackeddememail?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Seeking to divide us as a country, Russia blasted our social media feeds with disturbing and racist images to stoke the fires of hate and discord before the 2016 election.

My new book, "Dividing America," is a primer on Russia's secretive disinformation campaign that was hiding in plain sight.

When you read through this book, it might be shocking just how many of these images you saw online yourself, but more shocking is that, as a collective, we didn't recognize these divisive images as different from our own political rhetoric for over a year.

Most books by candidates are aspirational or autobiographical.

[**The book I released is neither. In fact, it 's not even about my campaign - it's about Russia's campaign on behalf of Trump. Hear more and download it below.**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648c4/1429800310/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackeddememail?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648c4/1429800310/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackeddememail?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
| | [CLICK HERE TO LEARN MORE >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648db/1429800310/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackeddememail?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

[**What 's being done and why:**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648da/1429800310/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackedourdemocracy?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

Right now, despite overwhelming evidence, absolutely nothing is being done.

Mitch McConnell refuses to bring bipartisan election security legislation to a vote in the Senate.

He's blocked EIGHT votes.

Every day that Mitch McConnell refuses to vote on election security bills, he's helping Russia interfere. And that begs the question, why?

Is it because McConnell wants to see Donald Trump win a second term?

Does he want the two of them to continue wreaking havoc on our democratic systems and stacking our courts with conservative judges to skew our nation's laws for generations?

[**We 're going to make it impossible for McConnell to deny what happened by flooding him with copies of "Dividing America" and demanding that he take immediate action to protect our democracy. You can send him a copy yourself below!**](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648da/1429800310/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackedourdemocracy?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648da/1429800310/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackedourdemocracy?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

| [SEND MOSCOW MITCH A COPY >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbac5e/134673f2/d5470b9/699648d9/1429800310/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/russiahackedourdemocracy?refcode=EM_FR_B1_081519_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=15&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")
---

It's up to all of us to stay informed and vigilant to be aware of what's being used against us so we can better defend ourselves.

But we also need to hold our elected officials accountable.

Together we must DEMAND that Mitch McConnell bring crucial election security legislation to a vote immediately to ensure a fair election in 2020.

Thank you,

Michael

| | Paid for by Bennet for America
---

clean_body: this is a longer email, but it's incredibly important | | | Friends, I want to talk about election security - how our democracy was hacked by Russia in 2016, how the interference persists today, and what we all need to do to stop it from continuing. This is a longer email, but I hope you'll take the time to read through the memo I've outlined below. Short on time? Get an overview at "" "" "" Seeking to divide us as a country, Russia blasted our social media feeds with disturbing and racist images to stoke the fires of hate and discord before the 2016 election. My new book, "Dividing America," is a primer on Russia's secretive disinformation campaign that was hiding in plain sight. When you read through this book, it might be shocking just how many of these images you saw online yourself, but more shocking is that, as a collective, we didn't recognize these divisive images as different from our own political rhetoric for over a year. Most books by candidates are aspirational or autobiographical. "" "" | | "" "" Right now, despite overwhelming evidence, absolutely nothing is being done. Mitch McConnell refuses to bring bipartisan election security legislation to a vote in the Senate. He's blocked EIGHT votes. Every day that Mitch McConnell refuses to vote on election security bills, he's helping Russia interfere. And that begs the question, why? Is it because McConnell wants to see Donald Trump win a second term? Does he want the two of them to continue wreaking havoc on our democratic systems and stacking our courts with conservative judges to skew our nation's laws for generations? "" "" | "" It's up to all of us to stay informed and vigilant to be aware of what's being used against us so we can better defend ourselves. But we also need to hold our elected officials accountable. Together we must DEMAND that Mitch McConnell bring crucial election security legislation to a vote immediately to ensure a fair election in 2020. Thank you, Michael | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

body:
We just checked in on our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed! | | |
No no no, team. We just checked our ActBlue progress, and not enough Democrats are stepping up to stand with Ed!

[](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-081519_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
_**[Help Ed reach our $10,000 goal by donating $10 or more before midnight!](http://ma.edmarkey.?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-august2019-weekly?refcode=EM-081519_2&amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
If we don't reach our goal this week, we could risk falling out of the fight against President Trump's dangerous agenda.

**Ed is a thorn in President Trump 's side.**

When President Trump's extremist FCC chair threw out net neutrality rules, Ed fought back by leading the charge to pass legislation in the Senate to restore a free and open internet.

When President Trump pulled out of the Paris climate agreement, Ed knew we needed a Green New Deal resolution to fuel a movement to combat the climate crisis.

And when the Trump administration decided to sell weapons to Saudi Arabia without Congressional review, Ed was among the first to stand up and denounce President Trump for selling out America's moral leadership around the world.

From day one of Donald Trump's presidency, Americans have rallied behind Democratic champions who are standing up to Trump's dangerous agenda.

_**[And that's exactly what Ed is doing every day. name: Team Weld
subject: Are you there Alec? It’s us, Team Weld
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://www.weld2020.org/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U21uF6k4eqf2zBvwZUYjk6-hRqkeppOf4jcemetErYOC-MIHwpGyJuz3kEyC8ANeARwuFescK-65TEBdWWwNMBF1&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190815_eng&n=1) Friend — Bill and the team have been crisscrossing the country, talking to voters about our campaign and our plan to reclaim the Republican party. _**We’ve been gaining so much ground in key states that the president even put down his phone for the night to hold a rally in Manchester, New Hampshire.**_ It’s clear we’ve got a message that’s resonating with voters from coast to coast, and **we know this because President Trump refuses to debate us.** [**Add Your Name: Demand Trump Debate Bill >>**](https://www.weld2020.org/time_to_debate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190815_eng&n=2) In the 2016 primary, Trump participated in debates with the dozens of candidates vying for the nomination without so much as batting an eye, _but all of a sudden Bill challenges him this time around and he’s too scared to hit the debate stage?_ Debates are important. They force candidates to defend their record; no handlers, no scripts, no BS. _**So why is Donald Trump afraid to debate us?**_ We’ve been trying to get a debate on the books for months, and so far we’ve heard nothing. [**That’s why we’re asking you to sign our petition — because if enough people stand up, and speak loudly, they won’t be able to ignore us for much longer.**](https://www.weld2020.org/time_to_debate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190815_eng&n=3) | | [SIGN THE PETITION ➞](https://www.weld2020.org/time_to_debate?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20190815_eng&n=4)
---
But, if they continue to balk on debating us, we might know a guy who could take Trump’s place on the debate stage next to Bill.
— Team Weld

clean_body: | Friend — Bill and the team have been crisscrossing the country, talking to voters about our campaign and our plan to reclaim the Republican party. We’ve been gaining so much ground in key states that the president even put down his phone for the night to hold a rally in Manchester, New Hampshire. It’s clear we’ve got a message that’s resonating with voters from coast to coast, and we know this because President Trump refuses to debate us. In the 2016 primary, Trump participated in debates with the dozens of candidates vying for the nomination without so much as batting an eye, but all of a sudden Bill challenges him this time around and he’s too scared to hit the debate stage? Debates are important. They force candidates to defend their record; no handlers, no scripts, no BS. So why is Donald Trump afraid to debate us? We’ve been trying to get a debate on the books for months, and so far we’ve heard nothing. | | But, if they continue to balk on debating us, we might know a guy who could take Trump’s place on the debate stage next to Bill. — Team Weld | Paid for by Weld 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States

name: Cory Booker
subject: re: We didn't make it, team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I know it's getting late, but we're _so close_ to reaching our mid-month goal. My team tells me we're less than $5,000 away. With only a few hours left, I need your help if we want to stay on track. **[We've already missed our goal once this month -- can you make sure we don't miss it again? Rush a donation of whatever you can afford before midnight.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdatebump-actives_actives_L1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** I know I can count on you, friend. Thanks for all you do,
Cory _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team -- I have some bad news and some good news. The bad news is last night was the deadline for our $350,000 mid-month goal, and we fell $18,216 short. The good news is we decided to extend our deadline until _tonight_. My team will now close the books on our mid-month numbers tonight, August 15th, at 11:59 p.m. **[Will you chip in right now to help us raise the remaining $18,216 of our mid-month goal?](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdatebump-actives_actives_L2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Team, I know this is no easy task -- August is historically a tough month for fundraising. But our campaign has seen real momentum since the last debate, and we need to show people that this underdog campaign can keep it up. **[So please, team, help us reach our $350,000 mid-month goal by 11:59 p.m. to keep us on track.](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdatebump-actives_actives_L3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks for helping us reach this critical goal,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-20190815-em3?refcode=em_fr_20190815_CB_20190815-fr-CB-goalupdatebump-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08b5/5fca0d19/71c27fb1/29192e2b/3525370494/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08b5/5fca0d19/71c27fb1/29192e2a/3525370494/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08b5/5fca0d19/71c27fb1/29192e29/3525370494/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc08b5/5fca0d19/71c27fb1/29192e28/3525370494/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
